summary: UltraMatrix recording delivers phenomenal sound, capturing the Dead at their peak performance in Kansas.
review: The reviewer hails this show as the Grateful Dead at their PEAK, praising the positive energy and especially the phenomenally clear UltraMatrix mix. Although no specific songs are highlighted, the brief but enthusiastic feedback points to an outstanding musical moment paired with excellent recording quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one short review; it is wholly positive about both performance and sound, suggesting a high rating but limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the sound as 'phenomenal', indicating a very clear, balanced UltraMatrix mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer’s focus is on overall peak energy and performance.
